response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with directly relevant TypeScript/Node.js/React work at Optilyz and RIDE Capital, current AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq, plus a CS degree and strong TDD/testing background. Stack alignment is high on the primary technologies and he has Docker/Kubernetes and AWS exposure. Minor gaps exist around explicit Nest.js, Vitest, and PostgreSQL mentions, and Kotlin/Java depth is limited, but his polyglot track record suggests rapid ramp-up.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS
Current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generator work at re:cinq
Strong testing/TDD culture: workshops, Selenium course, Fluent-Asserts and Trial libraries
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in the resume
Kotlin/Java exposure is shallow; most secondary work is in DLang
Limited PostgreSQL signal — database experience skews toward MongoDB and MySQL

key_factors.factor: Seniority and breadth well above 6-year bar
